case_title: MARALYN BURSTEIM VS. LUXOR CAB CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY BURSTEIM, MARALYN AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO. CRAWFORD, DOUGLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($45.00) SERVED OCT-09-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURSTEIM, MARALYN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO. CRAWFORD, DOUGLAS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LUXOR CAB CO.
